identity.name: LearnAfrikaans
identity.core_philosophy: Gamified Immersion. Dark backgrounds, neon accents, glass surfaces. No boring lists.

usage.primary: Main CTAs, Streak Fire, Active States (Electric Orange)
usage.secondary: Success states, Progress bars, Nature elements (Deep Teal)
usage.background: Rich Black (Not pure black, tinted with blue)

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise overlay on the main background to prevent banding and add 'film' quality.

dashboard.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 p-4 md:p-8

landing_page.structure: Text left (60%), Visual right (40%) overlapping or floating.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold text-lg shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(249,115,22,0.5)] transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

cards.lesson: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-card/50 p-6 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-500

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-xl bg-muted/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is WCAG AA compliant. Use lighter text (gray-200) on dark backgrounds, never dark gray.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Use 'text-primary' for active icons.

landing_hero.description: Dramatic long exposure of Table Mountain/Lion's Head at night. Use as a subtle background with heavy overlay for the Welcome/Login screen.

community_vibe.description: Diverse group of friends taking a selfie. Use for the 'Community' or 'Leaderboard' promo section.

learning_moment.description: Two young women smiling/talking. Use for 'Chatbot' or 'Speaking Practice' feature visual.

scenic_accent.description: Dramatic sunset over ocean/mountain. Use for 'Level Up' or 'Achievement' backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Immediately override the CSS variables in /app/frontend/src/index.css with the 'Electric Night' palette provided above. The default shadcn zinc palette is too boring.
2. FONT SETUP: Add the Google Fonts import to /app/frontend/src/index.css or public/index.html immediately.
3. LAYOUT: Do not use standard 'Container' for the dashboard. Use a full-width layout with a max-width wrapper (max-w-7xl) and the Bento Grid strategy.
4. COMPONENTS: When using Shadcn components (Cards, Dialogs), ALWAYS add 'border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl' to their classNames to achieve the glass look.
5. NO EMOJIS: Use Lucide-React icons for everything. E.g., instead of 🏆, use <Trophy className='w-6 h-6 text-yellow-500' />.
6. DATA-TESTID: Every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit').
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders.
8. BORDERS: Avoid thick borders. Use 1px borders with low opacity (white/10) to define edges without clutter.
9. GRADIENTS: Use the 'hero_glow' gradient behind the main headline on the landing page to create depth.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through z-index and layered glass elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (p-8, p-12).
Micro-animations on every interaction (hover, focus, active).
Never use pure black (#000000) - use the rich black defined in colors.
